title: Agent Atelier Brand Kit
description: Validation schema for brand_kit.yaml (PRD §7.2). The Brand Kit is the entire product-specific configuration surface; the generic engine docs and agents reference it via [[VARIABLE]] tokens resolved at runtime (§7.2.1). This schema enumerates required vs optional fields, closed enums, and the FAIL-CLOSED owner-confirmation flags that gate the three safety fields. A kit that does not validate against this schema MUST NOT be wired into a brand or used to publish (the resolver fails closed on unresolved required variables; §7.2.1, §14.2, §15.1). Model/provider names and API IDs are deferred to build time — confirm names/IDs against live docs before use (§14.3).
$comment: FAIL-CLOSED contract: claims_forbidden_confirmed, non_disclosure_rules_confirmed, and required_framing_confirmed are const:true. A kit with any of them false/missing FAILS validation by design — empty or owner-unconfirmed safety fields are treated as 'unknown' and block publish, never as 'nothing forbidden' (§14.2 fail-closed, §15.1). The Strategist must elicit each prohibition explicitly with worked examples and MUST NOT silently auto-draft them from marketing sources (§7.1).

brand_kit_version.description: Schema/version of this Brand Kit format.

brand_name.description: Public brand name, e.g. 'Acme Coffee Roasters'. Token [[BRAND_NAME]].

brand_short_name.description: Full brandmark line, e.g. 'Acme · Springfield'. Distinct from wordmark_text. Token [[BRAND_SHORT_NAME]].

languages.description: Content languages; primary = FIRST entry (§7.6). Token [[LANGUAGES]].

timezone.description: IANA tz, e.g. 'Asia/Kolkata'. Optional (defaults from environment).

brand_type.description: Content-strategy archetype; selects the active Creative Engine hook/shape pack (§9.1). Two packs ship; extend the enum when a new pack is authored. Token [[BRAND_TYPE]].

audience_persona.description: The one concrete reader in the writer's head. Token [[AUDIENCE_PERSONA]].

scroll_test_persona.description: Who must stop scrolling; used by Gate 0. Token [[SCROLL_TEST_PERSONA]].

sample_lines_good.description: 1-3 exemplar on-brand lines (optional but recommended). Token [[SAMPLE_LINES_GOOD]].

sample_lines_bad.description: 1-3 off-brand lines to avoid (optional but recommended). Token [[SAMPLE_LINES_BAD]].

logo_asset.description: Relative path under assets/ to the brandmark PNG, e.g. 'assets/logo.png'. Token [[LOGO_ASSET]]. See assets_contract.

wordmark_text.description: Short locator text under the logo. Token [[WORDMARK_TEXT]].

accent_dark_bg.description: Scrim/type accent on DARK photos. Token [[ACCENT_DARK_BG]].

accent_light_bg.description: Scrim/type accent on LIGHT photos. Token [[ACCENT_LIGHT_BG]].

headline_font.description: Serif headline font (file in assets/fonts/). Token [[HEADLINE_FONT]].

label_font.description: Small-caps label font (file in assets/fonts/). Token [[LABEL_FONT]].

visual_register.description: e.g. 'premium, warm, real-life; NOT stock/spa'. Token [[VISUAL_REGISTER]].

visual_variety.description: Treatment-menu width (§9.2). 'high' narrows the menu for tight-aesthetic brands while still rotating subject/angle/composition. Token [[VISUAL_VARIETY]].

visual_strategy.description: Image sourcing strategy (§9.2). product_led requires a populated assets/products/ pool. Token [[VISUAL_STRATEGY]].

people_pool.description: FIXED path to the real-person/leader photo pool (assets contract). Required as a source if any post depicts a named real person.

product_pool.description: FIXED path to per-SKU/reference product images (assets contract). Required when visual_strategy == product_led.

image_provider.description: Image model provider. 'gemini_image_pro' is the STABLE Gemini-native token (Nano Banana Pro / Gemini 3 Pro Image); confirm marketing name + API ID at build time (§14.3). 'replicate_<model>' selects a cross-provider Replicate model. Token [[IMAGE_PROVIDER]].

image_quality_tier.description: FLOOR/default quality tier; a CD 'premium' tag may UPGRADE a piece, never downgrade (§9.2). Token [[IMAGE_QUALITY_TIER]].

cta_style.description: CTA register. Used exactly; never invented. Token [[CTA_STYLE]].

cta_forbidden_phrases.description: Phrases the CTA must never use, e.g. ['register now','book now']. Token [[CTA_FORBIDDEN_PHRASES]].

channels.description: Target channels, e.g. ['instagram','facebook']. Instagram is the only launch publish adapter; others are manual-only. Token [[CHANNELS]].

research_post_min_per_week.description: Minimum research-grounded posts/week. 0 disables the standing research slot and its ledger/CD/digest enforcement. Token [[RESEARCH_POST_MIN_PER_WEEK]].

claims_allowed.description: Allowed claim patterns, e.g. ['reduces stress, with citation']. Token [[CLAIMS_ALLOWED]].

claims_forbidden.description: FAIL CLOSED. Forbidden claims, elicited explicitly (§7.1). May be empty ONLY if the owner has affirmatively reviewed and set claims_forbidden_confirmed:true. Token [[CLAIMS_FORBIDDEN]].

claims_forbidden_confirmed.description: FAIL-CLOSED gate. Must be true (owner-confirmed) for the kit to validate and for publish to proceed; false/missing => block + route to human (§14.2, §15.1).

comparative_claims_allowed.description: false compiles to a 'no comparative claims' hard-rule (§14.2). Token [[COMPARATIVE_CLAIMS_ALLOWED]].

political_content_allowed.description: false compiles to a 'no political content' hard-rule (§14.2). Token [[POLITICAL_CONTENT_ALLOWED]].

non_disclosure_rules.description: FAIL CLOSED. Bind both words AND depicted image; elicited explicitly (§7.1). May be empty ONLY if non_disclosure_rules_confirmed:true. Token [[NON_DISCLOSURE_RULES]].

non_disclosure_rules_confirmed.description: FAIL-CLOSED gate. Must be true (owner-confirmed) for the kit to validate and for publish to proceed; false/missing => block + route to human (§14.2, §15.1).

required_framing.description: FAIL CLOSED. Mandatory hedges; elicited explicitly (§7.1). May be empty ONLY if required_framing_confirmed:true. Token [[REQUIRED_FRAMING]].

required_framing_confirmed.description: FAIL-CLOSED gate. Must be true (owner-confirmed) for the kit to validate and for publish to proceed; false/missing => block + route to human (§14.2, §15.1).

regulatory_notes.description: Free-text regulatory context, e.g. 'wellness; no medical advice'. Optional.

citation_required_for_claims.description: Whether factual claims require a citation (typically true).

require_second_source_for_quantitative.description: High-stakes brands set true; quantitative claims then need a second corroborating source (§8.2). Token [[REQUIRE_SECOND_SOURCE_FOR_QUANTITATIVE]].

claim_reverify_months.description: Decay/re-verify horizon in months, e.g. 6. Token [[CLAIM_REVERIFY_MONTHS]].

offerings.description: One Offering Brief per entry; the single Offering Content Agent selects the brief per task by id (§7.4). Token [[OFFERINGS]]; per-entry tokens [[OFFERING_ID]] [[OFFERING_NAME]] [[OFFERING_BRIEF]].

id.description: Stable slug; referenced by standing_week track 'offering:<id>'. Token [[OFFERING_ID]].

funnels_from.description: Optional id of the offering this one funnels from (§7.4).

evergreen_pillars.description: Always-on topical territory for the Evergreen agent. Token [[EVERGREEN_PILLARS]].

local_detail_bank.description: Concrete local anchors for anti-drab specificity (optional). Token [[LOCAL_DETAIL_BANK]].

approval_mode.description: Approval posture. 'auto'/'auto_after_trust' also require auto_publish_enabled:true and a publish adapter (§12.3). Token [[APPROVAL_MODE]].

auto_publish_enabled.description: MASTER kill-switch (§12.3). Auto-publish requires this true AND approval_mode auto/auto_after_trust AND gates pass AND an adapter exists.

system_of_record.description: Where the queue/ledger/audit live. Token: system_of_record.

trust_threshold.description: Gates the auto_after_trust -> auto RECOMMENDATION only; never silently flips approval (§12.3, §14.4). Required when approval_mode == auto_after_trust. Token [[TRUST_THRESHOLD]].

assets_contract.description: Documentation-only block describing the required assets/ folder layout (the kit references files by relative path; this is not itself a data field). The folder is the sibling 'assets/' directory next to brand_kit.yaml.

logo.description: assets/logo.png — transparent PNG brandmark (referenced by logo_asset).

people_dir.description: assets/people/ — real-person/leader photo pool; compositing sources. Required if any post depicts a named real person.

products_dir.description: assets/products/ — per-SKU/reference product images. REQUIRED when visual_strategy == product_led.

allOf.$comment: product_led requires the products/ pool to be declared.
Auto-publish requires the master kill-switch on and a non-human approval mode (§12.3 precedence).
